creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
(In reply to Henrich Hartzer from comment #7)

I also have some bandwidth to help work on the churn in parallel, if needed. I am waiting on newer ansible releases, which depend on setuptools>=66.1.0, so I'd like to help get this bug and related bugs resolved. What work is still pending that can be tackled by multiple people concurrently?
